generated_oml:
instance MotorPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor position encoder mounted directly on the motor of MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryPositionEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary position encoder behind the gearbox of MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
]

instance SINUMERIK840DslController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller providing position, speed, acceleration, and motor current measurements for MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted, SpeedDataTransmitted, AccelerationDataTransmitted, TorqueDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorPositionEncoder
]

instance SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryPositionEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DslController
]

instance SpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DslController
]

instance AccelerationDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DslController
]

instance TorqueDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SINUMERIK840DslController
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor position data from MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredSecondaryPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured secondary position data from MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryPositionDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredInputCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured input current (I_M) from MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured speed data from MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredAccelerationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured acceleration data from MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AccelerationDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredTorqueData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured torque data from MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TorqueDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for friction simulation models in MABI MAX 100 robot digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShells : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shells (AAS) for data linkage between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService, DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance MQTTProtocol : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionModelIdentificationService
]

instance Dashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard for visualization of MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis data"
    DTDFVocab:enables DashboardVisualizationService
]

instance SysMLStructuralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram (BDD) and Internal Block Diagram (IBD) for structural modeling of MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Coulomb-Viscous friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Stribeck friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance DahlFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box Dahl friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance LuGreFrictionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "White-box LuGre friction model for MABI MAX 100 robot joint friction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance FrictionModelIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous multi-physics-aware identification of joint friction using white-box (Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck, Dahl, LuGre) and black-box models for MABI MAX 100 robot"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionBehaviorInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model refinement"
    DTDFVocab:provides ParameterUpdateAction
]

instance DashboardVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization for integrated data analysis of MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionBehaviorInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into joint friction behavior for motion accuracy improvement in MABI MAX 100 robot"
]

instance ParameterUpdateAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Friction model parameters updated based on deviation between simulated and measured data"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Unified dashboard visualization for integrated data analysis of MABI MAX 100 robot first vertical axis"
]

instance MABIMAX100RobotFirstVerticalAxis : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "First vertical axis of MABI MAX 100 industrial robot from MABI Robotic AG, comprising motor, gearwheel, and cycloidal gearbox with max working range [-90°, 90°] and max speed 75°/s"
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "None; the digital shadow has a one-way data flow and does not transmit any data back to the physical system, as explicitly stated in the reference model [32]."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time synchronization with live data streams processed continuously during robot operation for friction model identification, as evidenced by 'real-time, data-driven representations' and 'continuous identification during operation' in the abstract."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Digital shadow integrating SysML structural models, Simulink simulation models, Asset Administration Shells (AAS), live sensor data via MQTT, and visualization dashboard; one-way data flow from physical to virtual with processing components for traceability of data generation."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; the digital shadow is created and utilized during the operational lifecycle stage of the robot for real-time friction monitoring and motion control improvement, as stated in 'during the operation of an industrial robot' and 'continuous improvement... during operation'."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity validated by comparing simulated data versus measured data deviations; multi-physics-aware models incorporating load and temperature effects; white-box and black-box friction models combined for accuracy."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time sensor data streaming from physical robot to digital shadow; data transmitted via MQTT brokers without specified network architecture details."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards for data linkage; SysML [17] for modeling; DFG-funded project under Germany's Excellence Strategy - EXC 2023 Internet of Production."
]
